title: Versatile Mage Season 7
description: After the Flame Witch incident, Mo Fan returned to his training at the Magic City Academy, but at the most crucial moment, news suddenly arrived that his good friend Zhang Xiaohou had gone missing. The sentimental Mo Fan immediately halted his competition and, together with his vampire friend Liu Ru, rush to the ancient capital, venturing into the heart of the region where demons were active.
